title: Offline backup restore rehearsal
summary: Test that contacts, identity copies, maps, medical list, manuals, and project data can be opened on a second device without internet.
content: Test that contacts, identity copies, maps, medical list, manuals, and project data can be opened on a second device without internet. Keep at least one protected copy disconnected from the main device. Do not assume a file exists because its name appears in a cloud or recent-files list.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Offline backup restore rehearsal”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Offline backup restore rehearsal»
steps: Test that contacts, identity copies, maps, medical list, manuals, and project data can be opened on a second device without internet.
Keep at least one protected copy disconnected from the main device.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Offline backup restore rehearsal.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for Offline backup restore rehearsal.
warnings: Do not assume a file exists because its name appears in a cloud or recent-files list.
Official instructions and trained responders override this offline card for Offline backup restore rehearsal.
common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Offline backup restore rehearsal.
Failing to update the plan when conditions change during Offline backup restore rehearsal.
alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for Offline backup restore rehearsal.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Offline backup restore rehearsal.
The action creates a new hazard or delays qualified help during Offline backup restore rehearsal.
when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Offline backup restore rehearsal.
short_term: For Offline backup restore rehearsal, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Offline backup restore rehearsal, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Offline backup restore rehearsal, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Offline backup restore rehearsal to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
